features.title: Email Registration
features.description: Users create a Looply account via email + password, followed by a 6-digit email verification code. Includes form validation (email format, password strength, confirm password match) and agreement checkbox.
acceptanceCriteria: User enters email, password, confirm password, checks ToS agreement, clicks Create Account
System sends 6-digit verification code to email
Redirects to VerifyCode page; after successful verification, account is created and user is auto-logged-in
Duplicate email shows 'This email is already registered'
Password must be >= 8 chars, include uppercase, lowercase, and digit
Agreement checkbox unchecked -> button disabled

features.title: Google Quick Registration
features.description: Users create a Looply account via Google OAuth 2.0 (authorization code flow). If Google email already linked, logs in directly; if email occupied by email registration, prompts to sign in or link.
acceptanceCriteria: Click 'Continue with Google' -> redirect to Google OAuth page
On authorize, new account auto-created and logged in
If Google account already linked, direct login
If Google email taken by email registration, show prompt with guidance
Cancel at Google -> return to register page silently

features.title: Unified Registration Entry
features.description: Register page integrates email registration form and Google quick registration button in a single view, with 'or' divider and 'Already have an account? Sign in' link.
acceptanceCriteria: Email form displayed by default with 'or' divider and Google button below
Bottom link navigates to login page

features.title: Password Setup
features.description: Password input with show/hide toggle, strength indicator (weak/medium/strong), and confirm password field with real-time mismatch feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: Password field has show/hide toggle
Real-time validation: min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit
Password strength indicator shown (weak/medium/strong) - NOTE: not reflected in design
Confirm password mismatch shown in real-time

features.title: Agreement Acceptance
features.description: Registration form includes mandatory opt-in checkbox for Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Must be actively checked (not pre-checked). System records agreement timestamp and version.
acceptanceCriteria: Checkbox text: 'I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy'
ToS and Privacy Policy are clickable links opening new pages
Checkbox must not be pre-checked
Create Account button disabled until checked
Backend records consent timestamp and agreement version

features.title: Terms of Service Page
features.description: Static page displaying Looply Terms of Service content, accessible from register page link and footer. Includes title, body text, last updated date, and back navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays title 'Terms of Service', last updated date, and full text
Accessible without login
Back navigation preserves register form state
PC and H5 share same content, layout adapts

features.title: Privacy Policy Page
features.description: Static page displaying Looply Privacy Policy content. Same structure and behavior as ToS page. Content must comply with GDPR/CCPA.
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays title 'Privacy Policy', last updated date, and full text
Accessible without login
Content compliant with GDPR and CCPA requirements

features.title: Value Proposition Display
features.description: PC register/login pages show brand panel on the left (~40% width) with logo, headline 'Start your global e-commerce journey', subtitle, feature list, and gradient background. H5 does not show this panel.
acceptanceCriteria: PC left panel: brand logo, headline, subtitle, feature list on gradient background
Panel occupies ~660px (40% of 1440px)
H5 does not render brand panel

features.title: Email Verification Code
features.description: Shared verification code page for registration and forgot-password flows. 6-digit code input with auto-focus, auto-advance, paste support. Includes resend mechanism with 60s cooldown and hourly limit.
acceptanceCriteria: 6 individual digit input boxes with auto-focus and auto-advance
Supports paste of full 6-digit code
Backspace returns to previous box
Verify code button enabled after 6 digits entered
Wrong code: 'Invalid verification code', clears inputs
Expired code: 'Code has expired. Please request a new one.'
5 consecutive failures invalidates code
Resend link with 60s countdown timer
Max 5 sends per email per hour
Code valid for 10 minutes, single-use

features.title: Email Password Login
features.description: Users log in with registered email and password. Validates email format on blur, checks credentials on submit. Wrong password shows error with Forgot password link.
acceptanceCriteria: Email validated on blur (format check)
Password non-empty checked on submit
Successful login redirects to homepage or previous page
Unregistered email: 'Account not found'
Wrong password: 'Incorrect password' with Forgot password link
Locked account: shows lock message with 30-min wait

features.title: Google Quick Login
features.description: OAuth 2.0 login for users with linked Google accounts. If no linked account, auto-creates one (same as Google registration). Uses authorization code flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Click 'Continue with Google' -> Google OAuth flow
Linked account -> direct login
No linked account -> auto-create and login
Cancel at Google -> return to login page
Google unavailable -> prompt to use email login

features.title: Forgot Password
features.description: User enters registered email, system sends 6-digit verification code. For security, shows generic success message even if email is not registered.
acceptanceCriteria: User enters email and clicks send button
System sends 6-digit code (not reset link)
Generic message: 'If this email is registered, you will receive a verification code'
60s resend cooldown
After code verification, redirects to ResetPassword page

features.title: Reset Password
features.description: After successful verification code check, user sets new password (enter twice). Must differ from old password. Session expires after 15 minutes.
acceptanceCriteria: New password + confirm password fields
Same password rules as registration
New password must differ from old: 'New password must be different from your current password'
Success: 'Password updated successfully', redirect to login
15-min session timeout: 'Session expired. Please start over.'

features.title: Login State Persistence (Remember Me)
features.description: Login form has 'Remember me' checkbox. Checked: Cookie 30-day expiry with rolling renewal. Unchecked: session-level Cookie. Cookie attributes: HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax.
acceptanceCriteria: Remember me checkbox on login form
Checked: Cookie Max-Age=30 days, rolls on each visit
Unchecked: session cookie, cleared on browser close
Cookie: HttpOnly=true, Secure=true, SameSite=Lax, Domain=.looply.com
Password change invalidates all existing tokens

features.title: Active Logout
features.description: User triggers logout from avatar dropdown (PC) or profile page (H5). Confirmation modal appears. On confirm, clears session/token and redirects to homepage.
acceptanceCriteria: Confirmation dialog: 'Are you sure you want to sign out?'
Confirm: 'Yes, sign out' -> clear token, redirect to homepage
Cancel: close modal, maintain state
Logout failure: force-clear local token, redirect anyway
Button shows loading during logout request

features.title: Logout Entry Points
features.description: PC: user avatar dropdown -> 'Sign Out'. H5: profile page bottom -> 'Sign Out' button.
acceptanceCriteria: PC: avatar dropdown menu has Sign Out option
H5: profile page bottom has Sign Out button

features.title: Logout Redirect Logic
features.description: After logout (active, session expiry, or forced), redirect to homepage with appropriate message.
acceptanceCriteria: Active logout: redirect to homepage
Session expired: redirect to homepage with 'Session expired' message
Security forced logout: redirect to homepage with explanation

features.title: Logout Feedback
features.description: Full feedback lifecycle: confirmation modal on click, loading state on confirm button, success = redirect, failure = toast error.
acceptanceCriteria: Click logout: show confirmation modal
Confirm: button shows loading spinner
Success: redirect (implicit success feedback)
Failure: toast 'Sign out failed, please try again'

features.title: Password Validation Rules
features.description: Shared password validation for registration and reset: min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit. Real-time per-rule status display.
acceptanceCriteria: Min 8 characters
At least 1 uppercase letter (A-Z)
At least 1 lowercase letter (a-z)
At least 1 digit (0-9)
Each rule shows pass/fail status in real-time

features.title: Login Attempt Throttling
features.description: 5 consecutive wrong passwords locks account for 30 minutes. Lock is per-account (not IP). Auto-unlocks after timeout. Success resets counter.
acceptanceCriteria: 5 consecutive failures -> account locked 30 minutes
Locked account: show banner 'Too many failed attempts. Account locked for 30 minutes.'
During lockout: login attempts rejected with lock message
Auto-unlock after 30 minutes, counter reset
Successful login resets error counter

features.title: Registration Rate Limiting
features.description: Limit registrations: max 5 per IP per hour, max 3 per device fingerprint per hour. Generic error message, does not reveal rules.
acceptanceCriteria: Same IP: max 5 registrations/hour
Same device fingerprint: max 3 registrations/hour
Throttled: 'Too many attempts. Please try again later.'
Must not reveal specific limits

features.title: Email Sending Rate Limiting
features.description: Applies to both registration and forgot-password verification emails. Per-email: 60s cooldown + 5/hour max. Per-IP: 10 sends/hour max.
acceptanceCriteria: Same email: 60s minimum between sends
Same email: max 5 per hour
Same IP: max 10 triggers per hour
Button shows 60s countdown after send
Hourly limit: 'Too many requests. Please try again later.'

features.title: Error Message System
features.description: Standardized error display across all auth flows: inline field errors (red text below input), banner errors (page top), toast notifications (network/server errors). Security-sensitive messages do not reveal internal logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Field errors: red text below input with error border
Account lock: top banner with warning icon
Network errors: toast notification
Server errors: toast notification
All error text in red with error icon where appropriate
Security messages do not expose system internals
All messages support i18n

features.title: Session Expiration Handling
features.description: When token expires (naturally, password change, admin force, or account lock), frontend receives 401, clears local token, redirects to homepage with message. After re-login, attempts to restore previous page.
acceptanceCriteria: 401 response triggers session expiry flow
Clear local token storage
Redirect to homepage with 'Session expired. Please sign in again.'
Modal/overlay with sign-in-again button
After re-login, restore previous page if possible
Password change invalidates all tokens across devices

userStories.action: register an account via email or Google
acceptanceCriteria: Can register via email+password with verification code
Can register via Google OAuth one-click
Both methods lead to auto-login and homepage redirect
userStories.action_zh: register an account via email or Google

userStories.action: log in with email/password or Google
userStories.benefit: access my account and order history
acceptanceCriteria: Can log in with email and password
Can log in with Google account
Remember me keeps me logged in for 30 days
userStories.action_zh: log in with email/password or Google
userStories.benefit_zh: access my account and order history

userStories.action: reset my password via email verification
acceptanceCriteria: Can request password reset code via email
After verification, can set new password
Redirected to login after successful reset
userStories.action_zh: reset my password via email verification

userStories.benefit: secure my account on shared devices
acceptanceCriteria: Confirmation dialog before logout
Session and tokens fully cleared
Redirected to homepage
userStories.benefit_zh: secure my account on shared devices

userStories.action: review Terms of Service and Privacy Policy before registering
userStories.benefit: understand data usage and platform rules
acceptanceCriteria: Can access ToS and Privacy Policy from register page links
Content is readable, scrollable, with last updated date
Returning to register preserves form state
userStories.action_zh: review Terms of Service and Privacy Policy before registering
userStories.benefit_zh: understand data usage and platform rules

userStories.action: be notified and guided to re-login
userStories.benefit: understand why I was logged out and quickly re-authenticate
acceptanceCriteria: Session expired overlay/modal shown with clear message
One-click sign-in-again button
Previous page restored after re-login
userStories.action_zh: be notified and guided to re-login
userStories.benefit_zh: understand why I was logged out and quickly re-authenticate

userStories.action: have rate limiting and account locking in place
userStories.benefit: protect the platform from brute force attacks and abuse
acceptanceCriteria: Login locked after 5 failed attempts for 30 min
Registration limited by IP and device fingerprint
Email sending throttled per-email and per-IP
userStories.action_zh: have rate limiting and account locking in place
userStories.benefit_zh: protect the platform from brute force attacks and abuse

conflicts.description: Naming mismatch: PRD references 'Screen/ErrorState' and 'H5/ErrorState', but design files use 'Screen/LoginError' and 'H5/LoginError'. Recommend aligning to design naming ('LoginError') and updating PRD.

Design includes 'Screen/Login-Remembered' page (a returning-user variant showing avatar, name, and password-only login) which is not described as a separate page in the PRD. PRD section 3.6 mentions 'Remember me' functionality but does not define this UI variant. Recommend adding this page to PRD or confirming it's part of F-AUTH-014.

ForgotPassword button text mismatch: design shows 'Send reset link' but PRD specifies sending a verification code (section 3.4: 'Send Reset Code'). The actual mechanism is code-based, not link-based. Design button text should be updated to 'Send reset code' for consistency.
H5 端缺少 Login-Remembered 变体页面。PC 端有 Screen/Login-Remembered 但 H5 没有对应的 H5/Login-Remembered。如果确认 Login-Remembered 为正式需求，需补齐 H5 端设计稿。

PRD section 2.5 requires password strength indicator (weak/medium/strong with color differentiation), but neither PC nor H5 design files include a password strength meter component. Need to confirm whether this is deferred or should be added to designs.

PRD mentions Homepage as unified entry for Sign In / Sign Up and as logout redirect target, but no Homepage design exists yet (PRD notes '首页尚未设计'). This is acknowledged as a known gap for future iteration.

Design includes country-selector component (flag + country name + chevron) on Register and Login pages (both PC and H5), but PRD does not mention country/locale selection functionality. Need to clarify whether this is a future i18n feature or purely decorative.
